scripts.dev:ui: cross-env BASE_PATH=/ VITE_DEV_PORT=24725 pnpm --filter @workspace/urban-arena run dev
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,ui -c blue,green "pnpm run dev:api" "pnpm run dev:ui"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
